name: Bavdhan & Chandani Chowk
description: The immediate vicinity offering ultra-premium infrastructure. NA plots in Bavdhan and Chandani Chowk represent the pinnacle of West Pune real estate.
priceComparison: Commercial zone — not directly comparable, but drives Bavdhan premium

name: Kothrud & Karve Nagar
description: The cultural heart of Pune. Residents looking for premium villa plots in Pune often choose Bavdhan for its proximity to Kothrud's established ecosystem.
priceComparison: ₹12,000-18,000/sq.ft (apartments) vs Kekarav NA plots offering higher ROI
connectivity: Direct via Paud Road, 15-20 min drive

name: Hinjewadi & Wakad (PCMC)
description: Pune's largest IT corridor. Tech professionals seeking NA bungalow plots near Hinjewadi and PCMC find Kekarav the perfect peaceful retreat within PMC limits.

name: Baner & Balewadi
description: The high-street capital of West Pune. Fast connectivity makes Kekarav the ideal choice for those searching for premium plots near Baner or Balewadi High Street.

name: Deccan & Shivaji Nagar
description: Central Pune's historic and commercial hub. Easy access via Kothrud makes owning a bungalow plot in Bavdhan highly convenient for central city business owners.
priceComparison: High density apartment zones, driving demand for western plots

name: Aundh & Pashan
description: Established affluent neighborhoods. Bavdhan offers larger, greener NA plot alternatives compared to the saturated and expensive Aundh real estate market.

name: Kharadi & Viman Nagar (East Pune)
description: The eastern IT and retail hubs. Connected efficiently via the PMC limits infrastructure, investors from East Pune prefer the serene hillscapes of West Pune plots.
priceComparison: High IT demand pushing apartment rates, making land investment lucrative
connectivity: Via Pune city roads, 50-60 min drive

name: Pimpri Chinchwad (PCMC Core)
description: The industrial twin city. Investors from Ravet, Tathawade, and PCMC searching for IGBC Platinum premium plots prefer Kekarav's pure air and PMC limit advantages.
priceComparison: PMRDA/PCMC areas trade at a discount to premium PMC limits
